name: gbt-helloworld

# HelloWorld Skill

This skill demonstrates a simple "Hello, World!" example for testing purposes.

## Description
Use this skill to:
- Print "Hello, World!" to the console.
- Serve as a template for creating new skills.

## Workflow

### 1. Print Hello, World!
Run the following command to print "Hello, World!":

```sh
echo "Hello, World!"
```

## Notes
- This is a basic example and can be expanded for more complex workflows.
- Ensure the skill is correctly placed in the `.github/skills/` directory.

## Use Cases
- Testing skill integration.
- Serving as a starting point for new skills.
